title: Top-Down View of Vibrant Plant-Based Meal Preparation on Rustic Wooden Table
description: Square format image showing a top-down view of colorful plant-based meal preparation on a rustic wooden table. The scene includes fresh vegetables such as cherry tomatoes, bell peppers, leafy greens, and herbs, along with bowls of grains, black beans, roasted sweet potatoes, hummus, and mixed salad. The natural warm lighting highlights the vivid colors and fresh ingredients, creating an inviting and healthy food presentation without any people, logos, or text.
